message:
docs: mark MLP brain milestone as completed in roadmap

Updates project roadmap to reflect completion of baseline MLP brain
implementation with mutation and crossover operators.

Status change: "Currently In Progress" → "Completed - GPT-5 Codex 2025-10-21"

The MLP brain is now production-ready with:
✅ 200-node recurrent network
✅ Gaussian mutation operators
✅ Two-point crossover
✅ Change-sensitive synapses
✅ Full test coverage

Next milestone: DWRAON brain port

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
